MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-10-2026 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-10-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendants The Yellow Submarine and Hyn Group, Inc.'s Motion for Summary Judgment is OFF CALENDAR.

Plaintiff filed a request for dismissal, and the clerk has now entered a dismissal. Thus, the court orders this motion off calendar.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-27-2024 Set For Trial On May-11-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
